title: What HTML is
description: Tags, elements, and the document skeleton.

questions.prompt: Which declaration tells the browser this is a modern HTML document?
questions.explanation: <!DOCTYPE html> at the very top switches the browser into standards mode.

options: Everything from opening tag to closing tag, including content
questions.explanation: An element = opening tag + content + closing tag (or the single self-closing tag for void elements).

questions.prompt: Which of these is a valid, complete HTML paragraph element?
questions.explanation:
Hi

— open tag, content, matching close tag.

questions.prompt: Add the required doctype and title to make this a valid HTML skeleton.
questions.explanation: Every HTML document needs a doctype and a title in the head.
